result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text - text
LINE 14:     EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate)) AS ha...
                                              ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH case_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.newvalue__c AS assigned_owner_id,
    ch.createddate AS assigned_at,
    COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c) AS assignment_count,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c ORDER BY ch.createddate ASC) AS rn_first
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE '%%Owner%%'
), handled_cases AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS case_id,
    ca.assigned_owner_id AS agent_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN case_assignments ca
    ON ca.case_id = c.id
   AND ca.rn_first = 1
  WHERE c.createddate >= TIMESTAMP '2023-05-02'
    AND c.createddate <  TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02'
    AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND ca.assignment_count = 1
), managed_case_counts AS (
  SELECT assigned_owner_id AS agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS managed_cases
  FROM case_assignments
  GROUP BY assigned_owner_id
), agg AS (
  SELECT
    h.agent_id,
    COUNT(*) AS handled_cases,
    AVG(h.handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM handled_cases h
  GROUP BY h.agent_id
)
SELECT a.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM agg a
JOIN managed_case_counts m ON m.agent_id = a.agent_id
WHERE m.managed_cases > 1
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_seconds ASC NULLS LAST, a.handled_cases DESC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH case_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.newvalue__c AS assigned_owner_id,
    ch.createddate AS assigned_at,
    COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c) AS assignment_count,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c ORDER BY ch.createddate ASC) AS rn_first
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE '%Owner%'
), handled_cases AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS case_id,
    ca.assigned_owner_id AS agent_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN case_assignments ca
    ON ca.case_id = c.id
   AND ca.rn_first = 1
  WHERE c.createddate >= TIMESTAMP '2023-05-02'
    AND c.createddate <  TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02'
    AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND ca.assignment_count = 1
), managed_case_counts AS (
  SELECT assigned_owner_id AS agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS managed_cases
  FROM case_assignments
  GROUP BY assigned_owner_id
), agg AS (
  SELECT
    h.agent_id,
    COUNT(*) AS handled_cases,
    AVG(h.handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM handled_cases h
  GROUP BY h.agent_id
)
SELECT a.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM agg a
JOIN managed_case_counts m ON m.agent_id = a.agent_id
WHERE m.managed_cases > 1
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_seconds ASC NULLS LAST, a.handled_cases DESC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH case_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.newvalue__c AS assigned_owner_id,
    ch.createddate AS assigned_at,
    COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c) AS assignment_count,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c ORDER BY ch.createddate ASC) AS rn_first
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE '%Owner%'
), handled_cases AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS case_id,
    ca.assigned_owner_id AS agent_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN case_assignments ca
    ON ca.case_id = c.id
   AND ca.rn_first = 1
  WHERE c.createddate >= TIMESTAMP '2023-05-02'
    AND c.createddate <  TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02'
    AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND ca.assignment_count = 1
), managed_case_counts AS (
  SELECT assigned_owner_id AS agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS managed_cases
  FROM case_assignments
  GROUP BY assigned_owner_id
), agg AS (
  SELECT
    h.agent_id,
    COUNT(*) AS handled_cases,
    AVG(h.handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM handled_cases h
  GROUP BY h.agent_id
)
SELECT a.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM agg a
JOIN managed_case_counts m ON m.agent_id = a.agent_id
WHERE m.managed_cases > 1
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_seconds ASC NULLS LAST, a.handled_cases DESC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH case_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.newvalue__c AS assigned_owner_id,
    ch.createddate AS assigned_at,
    COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c) AS assignment_count,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c ORDER BY ch.createddate ASC) AS rn_first
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE '%Owner%'
), handled_cases AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS case_id,
    ca.assigned_owner_id AS agent_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate::timestamp - c.createddate::timestamp)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN case_assignments ca
    ON ca.case_id = c.id
   AND ca.rn_first = 1
  WHERE c.createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2023-05-02'
    AND c.createddate::timestamp <  TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02'
    AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND ca.assignment_count = 1
), managed_case_counts AS (
  SELECT assigned_owner_id AS agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS managed_cases
  FROM case_assignments
  GROUP BY assigned_owner_id
), agg AS (
  SELECT
    h.agent_id,
    COUNT(*) AS handled_cases,
    AVG(h.handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM handled_cases h
  GROUP BY h.agent_id
)
SELECT a.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM agg a
JOIN managed_case_counts m ON m.agent_id = a.agent_id
WHERE m.managed_cases > 1
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_seconds ASC NULLS LAST, a.handled_cases DESC
LIMIT 1;
